text.message: Only way to balance the game
Blue, can you trade me a brick for wood and ore?
Lue I will trade u what u need
I risked getting ploughed for everyone to have an equal game
I have wheat or black will win easy
I mean red would be too strong
You are still the strongest black
This just makes it a little fair
And I don’t have any wood
No you are more than fine
I made the sacrifice knowing that either you'll plough me or be on a sheep tile
My only wheat will be always blocked
I wanted to sacrifice sheep basically
But now I guess red is just winning lol
We'll get to know at the end who's winning black
I would not have any city
Rn it's whoever gets the rolls
Well, I’ve decided to return and solo block Orange for ruining my game
When you do something like this to have at least not a win
I’m fine being solo’s, if blue wins
Oj have only solo blocks mostly if I want to block you apart from that 9
10 solo orange is a great block always
I said if I want to block you
Someone true on me I can grief too if I can’t win per black
Especially you red, so be careful
Well black looks like you’re well into it again
Im not playing to win at this point, im playing to afford more knights to block you
Well your play had killed my game
Maybe with those trades actually I have the chances lol
I think you do. I feel like I’m not in the best position
No guys it stays on the 10 I’m fine playing this out
Yes he has road locked down
But you might have army locked down
As I said, not fighting the army
Just put it on the 10 it’s fine
Red just do it for him, why attack blue
Yeah, so 8 now is a block
I’ve said that your setup is a monster setup with both port + 6 ore

Can we get it off the 6 ore
